breakdown: This PR adds a normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function that converts LLM-generated 'xp'/'gold_pieces' keys to standard 'xp_gained'/'gold'. It applies normalization in the streaming passthrough path. Naming is excellent throughout. Type safety is weak - no type hints visible in the diff. Error handling is adequate via coerce_int defaults. The test coverage is thorough, using real LLM calls to verify the fix. Documentation is mixed - the new function lacks a docstring but test has good explanation.
key_changes: Add normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function to convert alternative keys (xp->xp_gained, gold_pieces->gold)
Call normalize_rewards_box_for_ui in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair for passthrough rewards
Add test file test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py with E2E test
Refactor canonical_stream_planning_block assignment logic in streaming block handling
Pop normalized keys (xp, gold_pieces) after conversion to clean output
